diagrams.title: C++ Compilation Process
diagrams.description: A flowchart showing the stages of the C++ compilation process, including preprocessing, compilation, assembly, linking, and loading.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the C++ compilation process

diagrams.title: C++ Compiler Flags
diagrams.description: A table showing the different flags used with the `g++` command, including `-c`, `-g`, and `-o`.
diagrams.purpose: To summarize the purpose and usage of the `g++` command flags
